notes: The first merchant-realistic draft-order creation slice is live-captured for custom line items, addresses, tags, customAttributes, invoice/detail visibility, and the created draft is immediately readable through `draftOrder(id:)`. HAR-117 expands the proxy replay request and capture harness toward a deeper merchant-realistic draft with shippingLine.price, order and line-item discounts, tax/payment inputs, and mixed custom/variant line item types; live fixture refresh is pending valid conformance auth.
